code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut cur = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if has_digit
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
          else
            result = list.push(result, cur)
          end
          cur = 0
          has_digit = false
          neg = false
        end
      else if b == 45 and not has_digit
        neg = true
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digit = true
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn parse_target(_ s: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let xs = parse_ints(line1)
  let target = parse_target(line2)
  match find_index(xs, target)
  when Some(i)
    print("index=#{i}")
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
end
